zh.lifeSummary: 當Miss ferch Gruffudd於大約1404年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾朋特時，她的父親Gruffudd "y Maer Coch" ap Rhys28歲，母親Gwenhwyfar ferch Ieuan35歲。她和Roger ap Watkin至少有1個兒子和4個女兒。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

historicEvents.description: Charles I of Spain became Emperor Charles V of the Holy Roman Empire.

en.lifeSummary: When Miss ferch Gruffudd was born about 1404, in Penpont, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Gruffudd "y Maer Coch" ap Rhys, was 28 and her mother, Gwenhwyfar ferch Ieuan, was 35. She had at least 1 son and 4 daughters with Roger ap Watkin.

ko.lifeSummary: Miss ferch Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1404년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 펜폰트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gruffudd "y Maer Coch" ap Rhys(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenhwyfar ferch Ieuan(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Roger ap Watkin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다.
